import os
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options
from selenium.webdriver.common.action_chains import ActionChains
from selenium.webdriver.common.actions.action_builder import ActionBuilder
from selenium.webdriver.common.actions.mouse_button import MouseButton
import time
from urllib.parse import urljoin
import requests
import re


def get_unique_filename(file_path):
    filename, file_extension = os.path.splitext(file_path)
    counter = 1

    while os.path.exists(file_path):
        file_path = f"{filename}_{counter}{file_extension}"
        counter += 1

    return file_path

def modify_url(src_url):
    # 'postfiles'를 'blogfiles'로 변경
    modified_url = src_url.replace("postfiles", "blogfiles")
    
    # URL 파라미터 제거
    modified_url = modified_url.split("?")[0]
    
    return modified_url


def extract_extension(filename):
    # 정규 표현식을 사용해 확장자를 추출
    match = re.search(r'\.\w+', filename)
    if match:
        ext = match.group(0)
        # 확장자의 마지막 문자가 숫자인지 확인
        if ext[-1].isdigit():
            return '.jpeg'
        else:
            return ext
    else:
        return '.jpeg'  # 기본 확장자



def download_images(base_url, folder='images'):
    options = Options()
    options.page_load_strategy = 'normal'
    options.binary_location = "/Users/son_macbookpro/Desktop/sonBook_Programming/python/study01/chrome-mac-arm64/Google Chrome for Testing.app"
    
    # 크롬앱
    chrome_options = webdriver.ChromeOptions()
    chrome_options.binary_location = "/Users/son_macbookpro/Desktop/sonBook_Programming/python/study01/chrome-mac-arm64/Google Chrome for Testing.app"
    chrome_options.add_experimental_option("detach", True)
    chrome_options.add_argument("--auto-open-devtools-for-tabs")
    # WebDriver 설정
    # driver_path = "/Users/son_macbookpro/Desktop/sonBook_Programming/python/study01/chromedriver"  # Update the path accordingly

    # driver = webdriver.Chrome()
    # driver = webdriver.Chrome(options=options)
    driver = webdriver.Chrome(options=chrome_options)
    driver.get(base_url)

    print("open")

    # 이미지 저장용 폴더 생성
    if not os.path.exists(folder):
        os.makedirs(folder)
    print("folder")
    # inspect
    # Locate the first image element
    # main = driver.find_element(By.ID, "mainFrame")
    # print(main)

    
    # ActionChains(driver)\
    #     .pause(1)\
    #     .move_to_element(main)\
    #     .pause(1)\
    #     .move_by_offset( 130, 150)\
    #     .pause(1)\
    #     .click()\
    #     .perform()

    # print("keyboard")


    main_frame = driver.find_element(By.ID, "mainFrame")
    driver.switch_to.frame(main_frame)
    print("switch")

    time.sleep(1)
    for i in range(40):
        driver.execute_script("window.scrollBy(0, 300);")
        time.sleep(0.2)
    
    # img 태그를 찾아서 다운로드
    img_tags = driver.find_elements(By.TAG_NAME, 'img')

    for img_tag in img_tags:
        img_url = img_tag.get_attribute('src')
        if img_url.startswith('data:'):  # Base64 인코딩된 이미지 데이터는 무시
            continue
        img_url = modify_url(img_url)  # URL 변경
        img_url = urljoin(base_url, img_url)
        img_name = os.path.basename(img_url)
        ext = extract_extension(img_name)
        name, _ = os.path.splitext(img_name)
        img_name = name + ext
        
        # print(f"{name} + {ext}\n")
        # 확장자 확인 및 추가

        img_path = os.path.join(folder, img_name)


        # 파일이 이미 존재하는 경우 새로운 이름을 생성
        img_path = get_unique_filename(img_path)    
        
        # 이미지 다운로드
        img_data = requests.get(img_url).content

        with open(img_path, 'wb') as img_file:
            img_file.write(img_data)
        print(f"Downloaded: {img_name}")

    # WebDriver quit
    driver.quit()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    base_url = "https://blog.naver.com/dbsxotkd1/222113764284"
    # base_url ="https://google.com"
    download_images(base_url)
